title: Concise & Precise Points
description: Points and sentences must be short and precise. Enforced caps: bullets <= 12 words; text blocks <= 2 sentences of <= 18 words each; headings/titles <= 8-word phrases (no period); table cells <= 8 words.
criterion: No bullet > 12 words; no sentence > 18 words; headings are phrases; no filler words.

rubric.3: One or two lines slightly over.
rubric.1: Multiple long, dense sentences / paragraph-style bullets.

bullets: Sequence numbers keep data in order

The three-way handshake is the process by which the two endpoints agree on their respective initial sequence numbers and confirm mutual reachability before any application data is transmitted across the connection

input.heading: In this section we are going to carefully understand the complete handshake process.

cases.rationale: Heading is a full sentence with filler, not a <=8-word phrase.
